description: Build the first production-ready client metrics monitoring pipeline for the iClaw desktop app across desktop, control-plane, PostgreSQL, S3/MinIO, and admin-web.

userStories.title: Add raw client metrics event schema
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I need PostgreSQL tables for raw client metric events so that install, launch, login, and core action events can be stored durably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add migration for `client_metric_events` with fields from the client metrics schema doc
Add indexes for event name, app version, platform, and device time-based queries
Migration is idempotent and compatible with existing control-plane schema bootstrapping
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add crash and performance sample schemas
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I need dedicated PostgreSQL tables for crash events and performance samples so that stability and performance data are queryable independently from general business events.
acceptanceCriteria: Add migration for `client_crash_events` and `client_perf_samples`
Add indexes for app version, platform, device, and metric/crash time queries
Schema bootstrapping loads the new tables without affecting existing migrations
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add control-plane event ingestion API
userStories.description: As a desktop client, I need to POST batched metric events to control-plane so that install, launch, login, and core action events are recorded centrally.
acceptanceCriteria: Add domain, store, service, and server route support for `POST /portal/client-metrics/events`
API accepts batched items with common client metric fields and validates required dimensions
Events persist to `client_metric_events` and are queryable in tests
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add control-plane crash ingestion API
userStories.description: As a desktop client, I need to POST crash and fatal error payloads to control-plane so that stability failures are recorded with the correct app and platform dimensions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add domain, store, service, and server route support for `POST /portal/client-metrics/crash`
API validates crash type, event time, device ID, app version, platform, and error summary fields
Crash events persist to `client_crash_events` and are queryable in tests
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add control-plane performance ingestion API
userStories.description: As a desktop client, I need to POST performance samples to control-plane so that startup and runtime performance metrics are captured centrally.
acceptanceCriteria: Add domain, store, service, and server route support for `POST /portal/client-metrics/perf`
API accepts batched metric samples with metric name, value, unit, app version, platform, and device dimensions
Performance samples persist to `client_perf_samples` and are queryable in tests
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Build desktop client metrics transport module
userStories.description: As a desktop engineer, I need one shared client metrics module so that all monitoring events use the same queueing, payload shaping, and flush behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a shared desktop client metrics library with `trackClientMetricEvent`, `trackClientCrash`, and `flushClientMetricQueue` entry points
Library attaches common dimensions including app version, platform, arch, brand, and device context
Library supports batched event flushes to the new control-plane APIs
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Instrument install and launch lifecycle events
userStories.description: As an operator, I want install and app launch events instrumented so that I can measure installation success and startup success by version and platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Emit `install_start`, `install_success`, and `install_failed` from the desktop startup/install flow
Emit `app_launch_start`, `app_launch_success`, `app_launch_failed`, and `runtime_healthcheck_failed` from the desktop lifecycle flow
Event payloads include install session ID, failure stage, and duration where applicable
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Instrument login and core action success/failure events
userStories.description: As an operator, I want login and core action metrics so that I can see business conversion and key workflow success rates in the client.
acceptanceCriteria: Emit `login_success` and `login_failed` from desktop auth flows with provider metadata when available
Emit `core_action_success` and `core_action_failed` for one or more agreed critical desktop flows
Payloads include action name, result, and error code for failure cases
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Instrument crash and unhandled exception reporting
userStories.description: As an operator, I want desktop crash and fatal error reporting so that renderer and runtime failures are visible in monitoring without relying only on manual fault reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Report unhandled renderer exceptions through the shared desktop crash metrics path
Capture crash type, error title, message, and stack summary when available
Crash reports are sent to `POST /portal/client-metrics/crash` with desktop dimensions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add daily metrics aggregation storage and job
userStories.description: As an operator, I need daily aggregated metrics so that admin-web dashboards do not have to scan raw event tables for common KPIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add schema for `client_metric_daily_agg`
Implement control-plane aggregation logic for install success, launch success, crash rate, and fault report volume
Aggregated rows are grouped by date, app, brand, app version, and platform
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Build admin-web install and stability metrics page
userStories.description: As an operator, I want an admin-web dashboard for installation and stability health so that I can spot version regressions quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an admin-web page that shows install success rate, launch success rate, crash rate, and fault report counts
Page supports filtering by app version and platform
Data is sourced from the new control-plane metrics APIs or aggregation views
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add performance sampling ingestion and admin-web performance page
userStories.description: As an operator, I want startup and runtime performance distributions visible in admin-web so that I can detect regressions in cold start and resource usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop emits `cold_start_ms`, `warm_start_ms`, and at least one runtime performance metric through the perf ingestion API
Admin-web shows a performance page with startup percentile metrics and basic filtering by platform and app version
Control-plane exposes the data needed for the performance page without scanning arbitrary raw payloads in the browser
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add alert storage and threshold scanning for release health
userStories.description: As an operator, I want automated metric threshold alerts so that severe installation, launch, or crash regressions are surfaced without manual dashboard review.
acceptanceCriteria: Add schema for `client_metric_alerts` and `client_release_health_snapshots`
Implement control-plane threshold scanning for install success rate, launch success rate, crash rate, and core action success rate
Alert records capture metric name, scope, threshold, current value, severity, and status
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
